/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--no-undefined "CMakeFiles/HexSynth_Standalone.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/HexSynth_Standalone.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX_utils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/HexSynth_Standalone.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_ARA.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/HexSynth_Standalone.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_LV2.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/HexSynth_Standalone.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Standalone.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/HexSynth_Standalone.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Unity.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/HexSynth_Standalone.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST2.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/HexSynth_Standalone.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST3.cpp.o" -o HexSynth_artefacts/Release/Standalone/HexSynth  HexSynth_artefacts/Release/libHexSynth_SharedCode.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfreetype.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libasound.so -lrt -ldl -lpthread -flto
